---
title: regularizeNd
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

This page is the home for a full tutorial series on regularizeNd and one deep-dive technical article.

## Attribution

This series is inspired by Peter Goldstein's educational progression on regularization and related historical tools including gridfit and RegularizeData3D. The tutorials here are independently written for regularizeNd with direct attribution and references.

## Publication Gate

Before public release, the exact File Exchange license terms for gridfit and RegularizeData3D must be verified and documented.

## Tutorial Series

1. [Part 1: Introduction and Intuition](part-01-introduction-and-intuition.qmd)
2. [Part 2: 1D Smoothing and Parameter Tuning](part-02-1d-smoothing-and-parameter-tuning.qmd)
3. [Part 3: Interpolation and Solver Behavior](part-03-interpolation-and-solver-behavior.qmd)
4. [Part 4: Boundary Behavior and Convex Hull](part-04-boundary-behavior-and-convex-hull.qmd)
5. [Part 5: Scaling to 4D and Beyond](part-05-scaling-to-4d-and-beyond.qmd)
6. [Part 6: Constraints and Mappings](part-06-constraints-and-mappings.qmd)
7. [Part 7: Iterative Solvers and Memory Strategy](part-07-iterative-solvers-and-memory-strategy.qmd)
8. [Part 8: Lineage and Practical Migration Notes](part-08-lineage-and-practical-migration-notes.qmd)

## Deep-Dive Scientific Article

- [Deep-Dive: Regularizer Design and Derivative Order](deep-dive-regularizer-design-and-derivative-order.qmd)

## Notes

- This section currently targets website pages only.
- Integration into regularizeNd docs is deferred.
- When docs integration starts, content will be adapted to MyST markdown.
